2022-23 Loyola (IL) Ramblers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 10-21 (4-14, 15th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Drew Valentine

PS/G: 67.4 (291st of 363)

PA/G: 72.5 (252nd of 363)

SRS: -4.65 (228th of 363)

SOS: 0.44 (134th of 363)

ORtg: 99.3 (289th of 363)

DRtg: 106.9 (301st of 363)

Preseason Odds: Championship +12500
